models.title: Bulkhead Panel Color Adapters
models.description: Color-code bulkhead connectors for XLR, powerCON, Ethernet, and other panel-mounted connectors. Built for stage setups, live production, and rack-mounted gear.

models.title: Astera Titan/Ax1 Truss Adapter
models.description: Secure mounting adapter for Astera AX1 pixel tubes on standard stage truss. Designed for quick rigging and reliable placement in live event and touring workflows.
